description_long: This is a modern, compact two-seater sofa with a minimalist design, featuring a rectangular form and clean lines. The upholstery is a smooth, light gray fabric that covers the seat, back, and armrests, giving it a sleek and contemporary appearance. The sofa is supported by four slender, metallic legs positioned at each corner, elevating it slightly off the ground. Three loose back cushions are present: two in a subtle plaid pattern and one in the center with a bold, multicolored geometric design in shades of orange, teal, and cream. The armrests are broad, flat, and at the same height as the backrest, contributing to the sofa's boxy silhouette. This piece would fit well in urban outdoor or indoor settings, such as parks, lobbies, or modern public spaces.
description: A modern, light gray two-seater sofa with broad armrests, metallic legs, and three loose back cushions, including a colorful geometric-patterned one.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full seat, broad armrests, and three distinct back cushions, with the central cushion featuring a bold geometric pattern.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the sofa's boxy profile, the thickness of the armrest, and the depth of the seat with cushions stacked against the backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, continuous back panel and the tops of the three back cushions, with the geometric cushion partially visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, showing the armrest's thickness and the arrangement of the back cushions from the opposite angle.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three loose back cushions: two in a light plaid pattern on each side and one larger, multicolored geometric cushion in the center; single, uniform seat cushion; all cushions are loose and varied in size.
attribute_armrest_style: Broad, flat, rectangular armrests at the same height as the backrest, with a straight profile and no visible decorative elements or padding contrast.
attribute_leg_design: Four slender, straight metal legs with a dark finish, positioned at each corner and slightly inset from the sofa's edges; legs are exposed and have a simple, modern style.
attribute_backrest_type: Low, straight, continuous backrest forming a rectangular profile, with no visible tufting or segmentation; backrest is topped with loose cushions for support.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Upholstery is solid light gray fabric with a smooth, matte texture; back cushions include one with a bold geometric multicolor pattern and two with a subtle plaid pattern.
